fluka_em_cut_scan.checklist_item: Scan FLUKA effective EM cuts if full-geometry or ancestry observables reopen a W2 EM-transport discrepancy
fluka_em_cut_scan.reason: Phase-2 generated-source Cu+Ta production closes the simple W2 EM-deposition toy benchmark; no ancestry gate has yet pointed to an EM-cut/material threshold.

geant4_megalib_1e6_decay_kernel.checklist_item: Build Geant4/MEGAlib 1e6/isotope production decay-kernel outputs if low-yield-line precision is needed
geant4_megalib_1e6_decay_kernel.reason: The current W2 conclusion is limited by full-geometry raw coupling. Low-yield-line precision is not needed to support the delayed-W2 raw-coupling/systematic statement.

runtime_point_location_before_production.checklist_item: Runtime engine point-location audit in Geant4/FLUKA, if required before production transport
runtime_point_location_before_production.reason: Production transport has already run from the shared deterministic Cu-64 parent stream; static source mapping and boundary-margin audits are complete. Runtime point-location remains a future mechanism diagnostic.

side_compton_fov_final_selection.checklist_item: Add final side-Compton/FoV reconstruction cut if manuscript-level final selection is required
side_compton_fov_final_selection.reason: The manuscript statement is a raw-coupling/systematic statement. The first failed phase is before final FoV reconstruction.

future_diagnostics: Runtime point-location inside dominant source volumes
Final side-Compton/FoV reconstruction if final-selection-level cross-code statement is later required
